name: Stable Hand
description: Young, overworked, underpaid, and the first person travelers talk to when they arrive. Knows who comes and goes before anyone else in town.
dialogue_hooks: offering to take your horse and asking how far you've ridden
mentioning an unusual visitor who arrived last night
warning that the road north is washed out
asking for a coin in exchange for 'good information'
voice_patterns: eager youngster — wants to hear adventure stories
surly teen — just doing the job, barely
sharp-eyed gossip — knows everything, trades in information
quiet caretaker — more comfortable with horses than people

schedule.evening: settling horses for night, final feeding
